extracted_claim: The customer is claiming damage to the front bumper and the left headlight.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The images clearly show the front bumper and headlight area, allowing for an assessment of the claimed damage.
claim_status_justification: Image 2 clearly shows a scratch on the front bumper. The left headlight appears intact in image 1, so the claim is supported for the bumper but contradicted for the headlight.
